info.description: A mock API with intentional security flaws for Checkov testing.

200.description: A JSON array of user names

get.description: Retrieve details for a specific order. Volontariamente vulnerabile a BOLA.

401.description: Unauthorized - Token mancante o non valido

403.description: Forbidden - Accesso non autorizzato (in caso di patch BOLA attiva)
